item_keywords: green tea bottle; tea bottle; plastic tea bottle; plastic green tea bottle; drink bottle; beverage bottle; plastic drink bottle; plastic beverage bottle; PET bottle; water bottle; soft drink bottle; isotonic drink bottle; juice bottle; bottle
answer_title: Yes — if it is a plastic drink bottle
chatbot_response: A plastic green tea or drink bottle can go into the plastics-only bin if it is empty, clean and dry.
preparation_steps: Empty all liquid. Give it a quick rinse if sticky. Let it dry. Flatten only if your bin sign allows it. Put the plastic cap back on.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If it still contains liquid or tea residue, empty and rinse it first. If it is a glass bottle or metal can, do not use this plastics-only bin.
escalation_trigger: If the bottle is leaking, smells, or has mould/unknown residue, use general waste or ask facilities.

item_keywords: mineral water bottle; plain water bottle; bottled water; plastic water bottle; disposable water bottle
answer_title: Yes — plastic water bottles are accepted
chatbot_response: Plastic water bottles are accepted in the plastics-only bin when empty, clean and dry.
preparation_steps: Empty remaining water. Put the plastic cap back on. Flatten if suitable.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If the bottle has non-plastic attachments or is heavily contaminated, remove what you can or use general waste.
escalation_trigger: Report if the bin is full of liquid-filled bottles.

item_keywords: BCRS bottle; deposit mark bottle; return right bottle; 10 cent deposit bottle; 10 cents deposit bottle; deposit plastic bottle; refund bottle
answer_title: Conditional — use Return Right if it has a deposit mark
chatbot_response: If the plastic beverage bottle has the BCRS Deposit Mark, return it to a Return Right RVM if you want the 10¢ refund. If it is being placed in this plastics-only bin, it still needs to be empty, clean and dry.
preparation_steps: For RVM refund, keep the container empty and uncrushed. For the plastics-only bin, follow the bin rules and make sure it is empty, clean and dry.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If it is a metal can with a deposit mark, do not put it in this plastics-only bin. Use a Return Right RVM or the correct metal recycling stream.
escalation_trigger: Ask facilities if your site has a separate BCRS collection point.

item_keywords: plastic bottle cap; bottle cap; plastic cap; cap from bottle; screw cap; drink cap
answer_title: Yes — plastic bottle caps can stay on plastic bottles
chatbot_response: Plastic caps can be recycled with the plastic bottle. Keeping the cap on after emptying the bottle helps prevent loose small items from being lost.
preparation_steps: Empty the bottle first. If the cap is plastic, screw it back on.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If the cap is metal, rubber, or mixed material, keep it out of this plastics-only bin.
escalation_trigger: If many loose caps are scattered around the bin, report contamination or housekeeping issue.

item_keywords: plastic bottle label; bottle label; shrink label; plastic label; drink bottle label
answer_title: Yes — labels can usually stay on
chatbot_response: Labels on plastic drink bottles do not usually need to be removed for normal recycling guidance.
preparation_steps: Empty, rinse and dry the bottle. Leave the label on unless your bin sign says otherwise.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If the label is covered with food, oil or unknown residue, clean it or use general waste.

item_keywords: shampoo bottle; soap bottle; body wash bottle; detergent bottle; laundry detergent bottle; cleaning product bottle; hand soap bottle; dish soap bottle
answer_title: Yes — plastic hygiene and detergent bottles are accepted
chatbot_response: Plastic shampoo, soap, detergent and cleaning bottles can go into the plastics-only bin if they are empty, clean and dry.
preparation_steps: Empty the bottle. Rinse away leftover soap or detergent. Let it dry. Keep the plastic cap on.
redirect_if_not_accepted: If it still contains product, empty it first. If it held hazardous chemicals, do not use this bin.
escalation_trigger: For chemical containers, ask facilities before disposal.

item_keywords: pump bottle; pump dispenser bottle; lotion pump bottle; soap pump bottle; spray pump bottle

redirect_if_not_accepted: Put the mixed pump in general waste unless your recycler accepts it.
escalation_trigger: Ask facilities if many pump parts are being placed in the bin.

item_keywords: plastic container; food container; takeaway container; takeout container; lunch box container; plastic lunch box; clear food container; meal container

item_keywords: salad container; fruit box; fruit punnet; berry box; clear plastic box; plastic produce box; clamshell container; egg tray plastic

chatbot_response: Clean plastic fruit boxes, salad containers, egg trays and clamshell containers can go into the plastics-only bin if empty, clean and dry.

redirect_if_not_accepted: If it is made of foam, paper, cardboard, or is greasy, do not use this bin.

item_keywords: yoghurt cup; yogurt cup; pudding cup; jelly cup; dessert cup; plastic dessert cup

item_keywords: plastic cup; cold drink cup; iced drink cup; bubble tea cup; takeaway drink cup; smoothie cup; plastic coffee cup

redirect_if_not_accepted: If the lid is paper, foil, compostable material, or contaminated with food, do not use this bin.

item_keywords: plastic bag; shopping bag; grocery bag; carrier bag; bread bag; clean plastic bag; poly bag

item_keywords: bubble wrap; air pillow; plastic air pillow; plastic packaging film; stretch wrap; cling wrap packaging; shrink wrap
